summary: Frontend-only verification of Admin profile dropdown + logout flow. 5/6 sub-tests passed. Login → /admin/dashboard works, profile icon (admin-profile-btn) renders, dropdown shows all 4 entries (menu-profile, menu-settings, menu-change-password, menu-logout in red), tapping menu-logout opens ConfirmDialog ('Are you sure you want to logout?' with 'Yes, Logout' / 'Cancel'), confirm clears referme_token from localStorage and redirects to /welcome. FAILS: after logout, directly visiting /admin/dashboard does NOT redirect to login — the screen still renders (with zeros) because /app/frontend/app/admin/_layout.tsx and dashboard.tsx have no auth guard; the overview API 401s but the catch swallows it silently.

integration_issues.issue: /admin/dashboard remains accessible (renders shell with 0 values) after clearSession because no auth guard exists in app/admin/_layout.tsx or dashboard.tsx. The overview API returns 401 but the error is swallowed by `catch {}` on line 61 of dashboard.tsx, so user is not redirected to /welcome or /login. Spec required redirect to login on unauthenticated access.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Likely from styles.menuCard shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset in dashboard.tsx:176 (and other Card components). On web RN, prefer boxShadow.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Tracks RN web compatibility but does not break functionality.

action_items: Add an auth guard for /admin/* routes (either redirect inside admin/_layout.tsx when getToken() is null, or in each admin screen on mount). Same likely needed for /student/*, /professional/*, /employer/*.
Instead of `catch {}` in dashboard.tsx load(), detect 401 and route.replace('/login') or '/welcome' so 401s trigger a logout-style redirect.
(Optional) Migrate `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` for react-native-web 0.20+ to silence deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Implement My Profile / Settings / Change Password screens — currently TODO no-op handlers.
critical_code_review_comments: app/admin/dashboard.tsx line 61: `catch {}` silently hides any API failure including 401 — should at minimum surface a toast or redirect on 401.
app/admin/_layout.tsx has no auth gate; an unauthenticated visitor can render admin tabs.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded admin admin@referme.app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-verify after main agent adds auth guard. Test: logout → visit /admin/dashboard directly → must end on /login or /welcome. Use viewport 390x844, EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. testIDs confirmed working: login-email, login-password, login-submit, admin-profile-btn, menu-profile, menu-settings, menu-change-password, menu-logout, confirm-ok, confirm-cancel.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction: 1) Login as admin, 2) tap admin-profile-btn → menu-logout → confirm-ok (token cleared from localStorage, router.replace('/')), 3) manually navigate to /admin/dashboard. Expected: redirect to login. Actual: page renders with 0s; admin overview API returns 401 but error is caught with empty handler in dashboard.tsx. Mitigation: in app/admin/_layout.tsx useEffect → if (!await getToken()) router.replace('/welcome'); OR centralize 401 handling in src/lib/api.ts to clearSession + redirect.
